name: Jenni's Puff Rolls
recipeInstructions:
These are the amounts for a large recipe of rolls for the bread machine. Put them into your machine in the order recommended.
Use dough cycle. When ready, knead a bit of flour into dough to make it less sticky. Using kitchen shears, cut off desired amount of dough and form into a ball. Place balls of dough on greased cookie sheet. Cover with towel and allow to rise until double; approximately 30 minutes. Bake at 375°F for about 10 minutes. May be frozen and reheated in microwave on high wrapped in a towel. Experiment with the timing... just until cozy warm, not hot to avoid toughness.
